title: Recursion
summary: 9618 P4 — recursive procedures, base cases, and stack behaviour.
learningObjectives: Trace recursive calls on the stack.
Write recursive pseudocode for factorial and Fibonacci.

simpleExplanation.title: Functions that call themselves
simpleExplanation.summary: Recursion solves problems by reducing them to smaller instances until a base case stops the calls.
steps: Every recursive function needs a base case.
Each call pushes a stack frame.
Unwind returns values up the chain.

sections.content: **Recursion** (19.2) follows **19.1 algorithms**. Examiners often ask for **trace of stack** on paper.
